name: smart-waste-collection
description: Smart Waste Collection & E-Waste Disposal Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:ml"
scripts.ml:train: cd ml_service && python generate_data.py && python train_model.py
